notable_phrases: Apple Intelligence marks the beginning of a new chapter for Apple innovation
18.1 adoption is twice as fast as the 17.1 adoption
strongest lineup we've ever had going into the holiday season
summary: Apple reported strong Q4 results with record revenue driven by iPhone growth and services expansion, emphasizing the transformative potential of Apple Intelligence while providing cautious low-to-mid single digit growth guidance for the December quarter.
change_summary: vs 2024 Q3: Analyst pushback level decreased by 13.00.
